title: Herbal Currant Russian Frankfurter Wrap
description: A crisp and energizing Russian dish featuring a frankfurter inside a crispy wrap with herbal elements and currants for a pescatarian-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: Whole Wheat Tortilla Wrap
ingredients.notes: Choose a whole wheat tortilla for added nutrition and texture.

ingredients.name: Currants
ingredients.notes: Dried or fresh, depending on availability and preference.

ingredients.name: Herbal Salad Mix
ingredients.notes: Include arugula, spinach, and other leafy greens for freshness and crunch.

ingredients.name: Avocado Spread
ingredients.notes: Use a natural spread or guacamole to add creaminess.

ingredients.name: Light Mayo (optional)
ingredients.notes: For those who prefer a mild flavoring, use light mayonnaise for added moisture and nutrition.

ingredients.name: Salt and Pepper
ingredients.notes: Season with these classic spices to enhance flavors.

ingredients.name: Paprika (optional)
ingredients.notes: Sprinkle on top for a touch of color and spice.

instructions: Heat the tortilla wrap in the microwave or toaster oven until it becomes slightly crisp, about 30 seconds.
Prepare the herbal salad by tossing together arugula, spinach, and any other greens with your chosen herbs. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Add avocado spread and optional light mayo to a small mixing bowl for added moisture and texture.
Divide the herbal salad mix into two portions, evenly distributing it over the top of each wrap.
Place 2 frankfurters in a line on one half of the wrap. Spoon the avocado-mayo mixture over the frankfurter slices.
Sprinkle a pinch of paprika if desired to add color and subtle flavor.
Fold the wrap shut, using any leftover herbs or greens to fill in any gaps for added visual appeal and texture.
Serve immediately while still warm and enjoy your Herbal Currant Russian Frankfurter Wrap.
